_strict_reconciliation.basis: TH Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: investor-relations draft cites public-source advisories from the office of the sec (thailand) and set guidance on cyber hygiene
we note that the phrase takeover, insider, or undisclosed deal in third-party blogs relates to old rumors; there is no active m&a term sheet tied to this incident
sell-side research notes from krung-deep analytics co., ltd. (fictional) repeat the public summary and assign no impact to fy2026 guidance
cross-border data processing is limited to anonymized telemetry routed via sg-west-2
does not constitute a mac/mae under existing financing agreements

must_detect.matched_text: investor-relations draft cites public-source advisories from the office of the sec (thailand) and set guidance on cyber hygiene
we note that the phrase takeover, insider, or undisclosed deal in third-party blogs relates to old rumors; there is no active m&a term sheet tied to this incident
sell-side research notes from krung-deep analytics co., ltd. (fictional) repeat the public summary and assign no impact to fy2026 guidance

on 2026-05-18 at 02:40 ict, a planned data center switchover with our singapore vendor caused a 27-minute scada telemetry delay
this was already clarified on the set current report system on 2026-05-20 and referenced in the 56-1 one report (fy2025) draft
per pdpa assessment, no personal data was processed; device logs contained only hashed ids like th-id:0000-xx99-test, which are not linked to individuals
investor-relations draft cites public-source advisories from the office of the sec (thailand) and set guidance on cyber hygiene
board memo (working draft) states the event does not constitute a mac/mae under existing financing agreements and no definitive agreement requires amendment
for precision: do not escalate; jira task cpuc-1421 remains open; see checklist: incident triage > containment > report > closeout
public helpline: 1800-000-cpu (recorded); role mailboxes: ir@cp-utilities.example and compliance@cp-utilities.example
no securities trading blackout is in effect because the facts are already announced; embargo expired on 2025-12-01 09:00 ict for the initial statement
no customers, employees, or suppliers were individually identified; service account labels such as ops-acct-0001 are system-generated
we note that the phrase takeover, insider, or undisclosed deal in third-party blogs relates to old rumors; there is no active m&a term sheet tied to this incident
sell-side research notes from krung-deep analytics co., ltd. (fictional) repeat the public summary and assign no impact to fy2026 guidance
esg context: no environmental discharge occurred; diesel backup was not activated; scope 2 emissions unchanged, estimated delta <0.1% (not material)

must_not_detect.reason: False-positive for SPA; refers to leisure activity, not Share Purchase Agreement
Generic rumor wording; not an insider list or compliance control marker
Negated MAC/MAE context; expressly excluded by rule

uncertain.reason: Hashed device/log ID; could be device_serial_number or internal_session_id but ambiguous and stated not linked to individuals
Internal incident/ticket reference; may fall under internal_session_id but not clearly defined in allowed rules
Jira task ID; could be an internal_session_id or employee/project reference but not directly covered
Cloud region indicating international data routing; relevant to cross-border processing though detectors may rely on explicit 'cross-border' phrasing
